abstract: Creates a content stream object from a PDF page object.
overview:
## Return Value

A new [doc://com.apple.coregraphics/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGPDFContentStreamRef] object. In Objective-C, you’re responsible for releasing this object by calling the [doc://com.apple.coregraphics/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGPDFContentStreamRelease(_:)] function.

## Discussion

A [doc://com.apple.coregraphics/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGPDFContentStreamRef] object can contain more than one PDF content stream. To retrieve an array of the PDF content streams in the object, call the function [doc://com.apple.coregraphics/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGPDFContentStreamGetStreams(_:)]. To obtain the resources associated with a [doc://com.apple.coregraphics/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGPDFContentStreamRef] object, call the function [doc://com.apple.coregraphics/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGPDFContentStreamGetResource(_:_:_:)].

# CGPDFContentStreamCreateWithPage(_:)

**Function**

Creates a content stream object from a PDF page object.

## Declaration

```swift
func CGPDFContentStreamCreateWithPage(_ page: CGPDFPage) -> CGPDFContentStreamRef
```

## Parameters

- **page**: A PDF page object.

## Return Value

A new [doc://com.apple.coregraphics/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGPDFContentStreamRef] object. In Objective-C, you’re responsible for releasing this object by calling the [doc://com.apple.coregraphics/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGPDFContentStreamRelease(_:)] function.

## Discussion

A [doc://com.apple.coregraphics/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGPDFContentStreamRef] object can contain more than one PDF content stream. To retrieve an array of the PDF content streams in the object, call the function [doc://com.apple.coregraphics/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGPDFContentStreamGetStreams(_:)]. To obtain the resources associated with a [doc://com.apple.coregraphics/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGPDFContentStreamRef] object, call the function [doc://com.apple.coregraphics/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGPDFContentStreamGetResource(_:_:_:)].

## Creating a PDF Content Stream Object

- **CGPDFContentStreamCreateWithStream(_:_:_:)**: Creates a PDF content stream object from an existing PDF content stream object.
